diagrams.title: IPv4 Header Format
diagrams.description: Complete layout of IPv4 header showing all fields in their bit positions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the structure and bit allocation of IPv4 header for packet analysis and troubleshooting

diagrams.title: IPv4 Fragmentation Process
diagrams.description: Shows how a large datagram is split into smaller fragments with modified header fields
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how fragmentation works and how header fields change in each fragment

diagrams.title: Fragment Offset Calculation
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how fragment offset is calculated using 8-byte block units
diagrams.purpose: Understanding offset calculation and how to reconstruct original data from fragments
